name: Saving Mr. Sparkles
short_description: Save your cat Mr. Sparkles and bring him back home. Use your momentum in order to beat short but challenging platforming levels.
detailed_description:
What would you do if your cat ran away? How far would you go to save him?

Saving Mr. Sparkles is a tough platformer where you have to use your momentum to beat short but challenging levels. Your goal is to chase after your cat Mr. Sparkles, save him, and bring him back home.

The game has simple controls. Simply run, jump, and (in later levels) dash. Though using a controller is still advised.
about_the_game:

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil
